mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Albert W.,Cleaveland H., F.Lee,Alabama and Lena E. Lawrence
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Albert W.,Cleaveland H., F.Lee,Alabama and Lena E. Lawrence Albert W. turned 21 04.24.1903, Cleavland H. turned 21 07.12.1904 Asa H. Lawrence, Guardian Recorded in Settlement Book 1,Page 169, in the Floyd County Circuit Court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
